message:
Fix reusable-feedback.yml: remove issues: write permission

The issues: write permission is not needed for commenting on PRs.
Removing it allows caller workflows to work with just:
- pull-requests: write
- contents: read

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,7 +15,6 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     permissions:
       pull-requests: write
-      issues: write
       contents: read
     steps:
       - name: Comment feedback request
